entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A key component of soil organic matter used to assess soil carbon content and sustainability

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: Organic material in soil that supports fertility and structure

entities.name: FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to support plant growth, supported by soil organic matter

entities.name: STRUCTURE
entities.description: The arrangement of soil particles, supported by soil organic matter

entities.name: CHROMIC ACID OXIDATION
entities.description: A process used to estimate soil organic carbon

entities.name: REDOX TITRATION
entities.description: A titration method using ferrous salts following chromic acid oxidation

entities.name: FERROUS SALTS
entities.description: Chemicals used in redox titration for soil carbon estimation

entities.name: SOIL CARBON CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of carbon present in the soil

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The long-term viability of soil health and productivity

entities.name: WET DIGESTION METHOD
entities.description: A method for the determination of soil organic carbon
